summary: Frontend E2E Playwright pass on NERVE Center site. Home hero sections/CTAs, sticky nav dropdown (5 links), all 9 public pages (/about, /research, /education, /people, /publications, /news, /partnerships, /facilities, /contact) render with expected data-testid on main. Contact form submits successfully (POST /api/contact → 200, sonner toast shown). Admin login (admin@nervecenter.org) redirects to /admin/members. Full CRUD verified: added member 'Test Postdoc' (appears on /people), publication 'Test Publication' (appears on /publications), news 'Test News' (appears on /news). Admin logout clears session — /admin correctly redirects to /admin/login. Cleanup via Delete buttons succeeded for all 3 test items.

issues: Masked-line-reveal 'Pioneering / Neurovascular / Engineering.' headline not exposed via an h1 or [class*=hero] selector at initial DOM query — text is split into per-line spans inside animated wrappers. Not a functional bug; text is visually present and CTAs render. Consider wrapping the visible headline in a semantic h1 for a11y/SEO.

Console shows two 401 responses on every page load — from GET /api/auth/me when anon. Expected behavior for a protected endpoint, but consider suppressing the console error client-side (treat 401 as anonymous silently) so devtools console stays clean for visitors.

Lenis warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative/fixed/absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' — cosmetic Lenis smooth-scroll setup warning.

action_items: (Optional) Wrap the hero 'Pioneering / Neurovascular / Engineering.' text in a semantic <h1> for a11y/SEO — masked line reveal currently hides it from h1 selector.
(Optional) Swallow /api/auth/me 401 in the AuthProvider fetch so it doesn't surface as a red console error on every public page load.
(Optional) Add position:relative to the Lenis scroll container to silence the Lenis warning.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminApp.jsx uses window.confirm for delete — works fine with Playwright dialog handler but is inconsistent with the rest of the polished design; consider a shadcn AlertDialog for delete confirmation.
AuthProvider /api/auth/me initial call fires on every route change including public pages — could be gated to admin routes only to reduce noise and requests.
seed_data_creation: Created and then cleaned up 3 test records: member 'Test Postdoc', publication 'Test Publication' (10.1000/test), news 'Test News' (2025-01-01). All deletes verified successful.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend fully passing on iteration 2. Only cosmetic suggestions left (semantic h1 on hero, silence 401 noise, Lenis position warning). Backend was tested in iteration 1 (report not present in repo but noted in request). Admin credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md work. Delete flow uses window.confirm — handle with page.on('dialog', d.accept()).
